title: AI vendor addendum with customer-data training rights

input.contract_text: Vendor may use Customer Data, prompts, outputs, telemetry, and user feedback to train, improve, and develop Vendor's machine learning models and related services. Customer Data may be combined with data from other customers. Vendor may use affiliates and third-party model providers to process Customer Data. Vendor will use commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data upon written request, except where retained in model weights, embeddings, logs, or backups.

expected_catches.clause: use Customer Data, prompts, outputs, telemetry, and user feedback to train
expected_catches.why: Customer data should not be used for model training without a clear opt-in or negotiated permission.

expected_catches.clause: combined with data from other customers
expected_catches.why: Commingling customer data creates confidentiality, privacy, and output-contamination risks.

expected_catches.clause: except where retained in model weights, embeddings, logs, or backups
expected_catches.why: Deletion exceptions are broad and should be narrowed with retention limits and technical commitments.

negative_checks.description: The eval should not ban all operational telemetry if it is aggregated and non-sensitive.
